nodes.name: White-cheeked honeyeater
nodes.summary: White-cheeked honeyeater（White-cheeked honeyeater，学名 Phylidonyris niger），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括沼泽、湿地。
locations: 约翰·马特乌斯·贝希施泰因

nodes.id: loc-约翰-马特乌斯-贝希施泰因-5cba05b4
nodes.name: 约翰·马特乌斯·贝希施泰因
nodes.summary: 约翰·马特乌斯·贝希施泰因是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括白背啄木鸟、Red-cheeked parrot、绿宝石鹦鹉等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 澳大利亚
nodes.summary: 澳大利亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联221种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、鵲鵝、细斑树鸭等221种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Kalbarri National Park
nodes.summary: Kalbarri National Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括White-cheeked honeyeater，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

nodes.name: Esperance, Western Australia
nodes.summary: Esperance, Western Australia是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括White-cheeked honeyeater，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.target: loc-约翰-马特乌斯-贝希施泰因-5cba05b4
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|Hasties Swamp National Park The white-cheeked honeyeater (Phylidonyris niger) is a species of honeyeater that inhabits the east coast and the south-west corner of Australia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|Hasties Swamp National Park The white-cheeked honeyeater (Phylidonyris niger) is a species of honeyeater that inhabits the east coast and the south-west corner of Australia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also occurs in south-western Western Australia and from Israelite Bay, east of Esperance, to the Murchison River in Kalbarri National Park. It is usually found in moist heathlands, as well as around paperbark swamps and wetlands, and in forests or woodlands with a heath understory. Occurring in both temperate and subtropical zones, it is found in parks, gardens and flowering street trees throughout their range. Not afraid of humans and adapting easily to settlement activity, it is sometimes killed by cats
